title: 皐月賞の後に・2つの可能性

text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki does well at the Satsuki Sho, but she's
unsettled by an odd sensation in her legs after
the race...

She suspects it has something to do with her
distance aptitude, so she enlists the help of
Agnes Tachyon to test out her hypothesis.

Their findings reveal that Fuji Kiseki really is more
suited to mile-long races than medium-length
races.

The next day, she reports her discovery to me.
The Japanese Derby and Kikuka Sho are longer
races, but she relishes the challenge of running
them.

I'm torn between whether she should continue the
Classic Triple Crown tour despite the difficulty, or
switch to the mile tour, which would allow her to
run at her very best...
